title: New signups who finished KYC but never invested
summary: KYC done, bank linked, then silence. The gap between onboarding and the first trade is where AUM dies.

title: Merchants who integrated the gateway but never went live
summary: Gateway integration complete, zero live transactions. The hard part is done — something stopped them at the last mile.

title: Customers who bought once and never came back
summary: They liked you once. Bring them back before a rival does.

title: Prospects who went silent after the demo
summary: High intent signals everywhere, zero response to the AE. A well-timed voice call converts what email never will.

title: Investors with money on the platform who stopped logging in
summary: The money is already there. No login in 90 days. A check-in call resurfaces the portfolio.

title: Trial users in the final 72 hours
summary: They love the product but have not pulled the trigger. Budget, approval, or a missing feature?

title: Subscribers whose payment failed
summary: The customer never decided to leave — their card did. One call saves the subscription.

title: Calling inbound demo requests back within minutes
summary: Conversion drops by the minute after the form fill. Call back fast, qualify, and book the meeting.

title: Personal-loan leads from paid ads that mostly turn out junk
summary: Meta and Google fill the form for pennies, but most leads are wrong-income, rate-shoppers or mis-taps. The team burns the day on dead numbers while the pixel keeps buying more of the same.

title: Exit interviews within 48 hours of cancellation
summary: Wait a week and you get polite nothing. A structured call within 48 hours gets the honest answer.

title: Accounts that just downgraded
summary: Not churn — negotiation. What made them shrink, and what would make them grow back?

title: Overdue invoices stuck in someone’s finance queue
summary: Day 45, unpaid — not refusal, just stuck with someone's finance team. Find where it is stuck, get a date.

title: Candidates who accepted the offer but might not join
summary: 30–50% of accepted offers never show up on day one. Keep-warm calls catch counter-offers early.

title: Sellers who registered but never listed a product
summary: Registered, KYC uploaded, zero listings. Every day without a catalog is GMV you will never see.

title: Investors whose SIPs stopped
summary: Market fear, cash crunch, or just forgot? Every silent month is compounding AUM loss.

title: Drivers whose weekly trips collapsed
summary: Earnings, incentives, app issue, or a rival platform? You need to know before they are gone.

title: Collection calls for overdue EMIs
summary: Cash flow, dispute, or forgot? The first call decides the entire recovery strategy.

title: Merchants whose payment volume suddenly dropped
summary: No ticket, no complaint, no churn request. Just silence. Nobody investigated.

title: Fraud verification calls for flagged transactions
summary: The system flagged it. A call within minutes verifies identity, confirms or denies, and unblocks the legitimate ones.

title: Loan applications stuck on one missing document
summary: Pre-approved, then stalled on one missing document. An incomplete file is revenue sitting one PDF away.

title: Re-KYC before the account freezes
summary: Miss the RBI window and the account freezes. Every freeze is a support ticket plus a churn risk.

title: Checking patients are taking their medicines after discharge
summary: Side effects, cost, confusion, or no family support — catch non-adherence before it becomes a readmission.

title: Patients who never booked the follow-up appointment
summary: The treatment is incomplete and the revenue is leaking. Capture the reason and rebook on the spot.

title: Confirming patients are ready 48 hours before surgery
summary: Wrong prep means a cancelled procedure and a wasted OT slot. Confirm readiness 48 hours before.

title: Chronic patients who stopped refilling their medicines
summary: Switched pharmacies — or stopped taking the medication? For diabetes and hypertension, the difference is everything.

title: Accounts whose usage is falling with zero complaints
summary: No complaints, no tickets, just declining logins. A renewal nobody knows is at risk yet.

title: Calling unhappy customers after an NPS drop
summary: Survey data gives you the score, not the story. Run follow-up conversations with the detractors.

title: Feature requests you're about to build without validating
summary: The same request keeps coming up, so it's near the top of the roadmap. But nobody has called the people who asked to find what they're really trying to do — and half of built features ship to silence.

title: Pricing changes shipped on gut instead of what customers will pay
summary: The price is about to move — on instinct, a board nudge, and a glance at a competitor. Nobody has asked customers what they'd actually pay, or what makes them flinch, before a number that touches everyone goes live.

title: Users who stalled in onboarding and never reached first value
summary: They signed up, started setup, and stopped one step short of the aha moment. The dashboards show the drop-off cliff but never the reason — and that reason is the highest-leverage thing a PM can learn.
